title: Feedback - Mopinion form is opened
scenario: Verify the Mopinion feedback form displays correctly with all fields, options, and Send button in App Settings > Feedback tab
expected: The Mopinion feedback form is displayed as a web page containing empty fields and options. Options include: Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other. Fields include: Your Feedback, Name, Last name, email. A Send button is present at the bottom.
